title: Penalties
doc_html:
§11.  Penalties

Section 11.  Willful violation of any provision of this Part shall be a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not more than five hundred dollars or by imprisonment for not more than six months, or both.
doc_text:
§11.  Penalties
Section 11.  Willful violation of any provision of this Part shall be a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not more than five hundred dollars or by imprisonment for not more than six months, or both.
